description: This file defines an asynchronous function generateStaticParams for a web application, likely using a framework like Next.js, to generate static parameters for dynamic routing. The function currently returns an empty array, indicating no static params are prebuilt, and comments suggest it handles runtime data fetching for recipe pages.

methods.name: generateStaticParams
